manifest_name.message: Email Templates & Canned Responses for Gmail & LinkedIn
manifest_name.description: Extension title shown in Chrome Web Store and settings

manifest_description.message: Keyboard-first email templates with reliable rich-text insertion in Gmail & LinkedIn. Local-first, no account.
manifest_description.description: Extension description shown in Chrome Web Store and settings

command_open_picker.message: Open the template picker at the caret
command_open_picker.description: Keyboard shortcut description shown in Chrome shortcuts settings

ctx_save_selection.description: Context-menu item shown on right-click when text is selected in Gmail/LinkedIn

popup_hint.message: Press Alt+A in a compose box to insert. Click a template here to copy it.
popup_hint.description: Instruction text in popup explaining the hotkey and click-to-copy

search_placeholder.description: Placeholder for the template search/filter input (shared across popup, options, picker, manager)

button_export_backup.description: Button that triggers backup/export of all templates

popup_manage_button.description: Button to open the options/manager page from the popup

empty_no_matches.description: Empty state shown when a search query returns no results

popup_empty_no_templates.description: Empty state in popup when no templates exist at all

template_untitled.description: Default label/fallback for templates that have no title set

popup_status_copied.description: Toast shown after a template is copied to clipboard from the popup

popup_status_copy_failed.description: Error shown when copy-to-clipboard fails in the popup

popup_status_backup_downloaded.description: Confirmation shown after a backup file is downloaded

options_page_title.description: Browser tab title for the options/manager page

settings_theme_label.description: Label preceding the theme selector in the header

settings_theme_tooltip.description: Tooltip for the theme selector dropdown

theme_system.description: Theme option that follows the OS/system preference

settings_shortcut_label.description: Label preceding the current insert-picker hotkey in the header

settings_hotkey_tooltip.description: Tooltip for the hotkey record button

button_export_tooltip.message: Download a backup of all templates

button_import_tooltip.message: Import templates from a backup file

backup_nudge_weekly_checkbox.description: Checkbox label to enable weekly backup reminders

button_dismiss.description: Tooltip for the backup-nudge dismiss (×) button

button_new_template.description: Button to create a new template

keyboard_shortcuts_heading.description: Heading of the keyboard-shortcuts panel in the sidebar footer

settings_analytics_note.message: Off by default. Helps improve the extension — no message or template content is ever sent.
settings_analytics_note.description: Privacy explanation for the analytics opt-in

button_prev_page_tooltip.description: Tooltip for the previous-page pager button

button_next_page_tooltip.description: Tooltip for the next-page pager button

modal_preview_title.description: Title of the template preview modal

button_close_tooltip.description: Tooltip/label for close (×) buttons on modal, picker, and manager

preview_variables_note.message: Variables are shown highlighted — they're filled in when you insert the template.
preview_variables_note.description: Note in the preview modal explaining variable highlighting

sidebar_all_templates.description: Sidebar/virtual-view label for the 'all templates' view

sidebar_favorites.description: Sidebar/virtual-view label for the favorites view

sidebar_trash.description: Sidebar/virtual-view label for the trash view

field_label_category.description: Label for the category selector and fallback label when a category is missing

button_category_menu_tooltip.description: Tooltip for the per-category context-menu (edit) button in the sidebar

keyboard_shortcuts_empty_hint.message: Add a shortcut to a template to expand it with ;name + Tab.
keyboard_shortcuts_empty_hint.description: Empty state in the keyboard-shortcuts panel

shortcuts_item_title.description: Tooltip for a shortcut row in the shortcuts panel

context_rename_category.description: Context-menu item to rename a category

context_delete_category.description: Context-menu item to delete a category

prompt_rename_category.description: Prompt dialog text when renaming a category

confirm_delete_empty_category.description: Confirmation when deleting an empty category

empty_trash.description: Empty state shown when the trash view has no items

empty_favorites.message: No favorites yet — star a template to pin it here.
empty_favorites.description: Empty state for the favorites view

empty_category.description: Empty state for a category with no templates

empty_all_templates.description: Empty state when no templates exist, with a call to create one

button_favorite_tooltip.description: Tooltip for the favorite/star toggle on cards, the editor, and the manager list

button_more_tooltip.description: Tooltip for the per-card overflow (…) menu button

template_empty_body.description: Placeholder shown when a template body/snippet is empty

button_restore.description: Button to restore a template from trash

button_delete_forever.description: Button to permanently delete a template from trash

alert_restore_limit_reached.message: Couldn't restore — you're at the $limit$-template limit. Delete one first.
alert_restore_limit_reached.description: Alert when restoring would exceed the free-plan template limit

confirm_delete_template_forever.message: Permanently delete this template? This can't be undone.
confirm_delete_template_forever.description: Confirmation for permanently deleting a single template

trash_header_note.message: Items in Trash can be restored.
trash_header_note.description: Note in the trash view header

button_empty_trash.description: Button to permanently empty the trash

confirm_empty_trash.message: Permanently delete everything in Trash? This can't be undone.
confirm_empty_trash.description: Confirmation for emptying the entire trash

pager_label.description: Pagination label showing the visible range and total

context_unfavorite.description: Card context-menu item to remove favorite status

context_favorite.description: Card context-menu item to add to favorites

context_duplicate.description: Card context-menu item to duplicate a template

context_menu_move_to.description: Heading of the 'move to category' submenu

context_uncategorized.description: Option representing no category (uncategorized) in move menu and editor dropdown

context_new_category.description: Option to create a new category while moving/assigning a template

context_delete_template.description: Card context-menu item to delete (move to trash) a template

duplicate_title_suffix.description: Title given to a duplicated template (' copy' appended)

alert_duplicate_limit_reached.message: You've reached the $limit$-template limit on the free plan.
alert_duplicate_limit_reached.description: Alert when duplicating would exceed the free-plan template limit

prompt_new_category_name.description: Prompt for entering a new category name

editor_placeholder_title.description: Heading shown in the editor pane when no template is selected

editor_placeholder_text.message: Pick a template, or click + New to create one. Organize with categories on the left.
editor_placeholder_text.description: Instructional text in the editor placeholder

field_label_title.description: Label for the template name/title input

field_placeholder_title.description: Example placeholder for the template name input

field_label_shortcut.description: Label for the shortcut input field

field_optional_marker.description: Marker indicating a field is optional

field_label_body.description: Label for the rich-text template body editor

toolbar_font_label.description: Default/label option for the font selector

toolbar_size_label.description: Default/label option for the font size selector

toolbar_bullet_list_tooltip.description: Tooltip for the bullet list button

toolbar_numbered_list_tooltip.description: Tooltip for the numbered list button

toolbar_variables_label.description: Default/label option for the variable-insertion selector

button_preview.description: Preview button in the editor toolbar

button_delete.description: Delete action label/tooltip in editor, picker list, and manager

button_save.description: Save button in the options editor

status_reverted.description: Status message after unsaved changes are reverted

status_saved.description: Status for an explicit user-initiated save

status_saved_no_images_upsell.message: Saved (text & formatting). Images are a Pro feature — upgrade to keep them.
status_saved_no_images_upsell.description: Status when images were stripped on save (Pro upsell)

confirm_delete_template_to_trash.description: Confirmation for moving a template to trash from the editor

prompt_link_url.description: Prompt for the URL when inserting a link

status_recording_hotkey.description: Button text shown while recording a new hotkey

status_hotkey_invalid.description: Feedback when an invalid hotkey combination is pressed

alert_create_limit_reached.message: You've reached the $limit$-template limit on the free plan. Delete one to add more.
alert_create_limit_reached.description: Alert/error when creating a new template would exceed the free-plan limit

alert_import_partial.message: Imported $count$ of $total$ — the rest hit the $limit$-template free-plan limit.
alert_import_partial.description: Alert when an import partially succeeds due to the plan limit

alert_import_failed.message: Import failed — that doesn't look like a valid Canned Responses JSON file.
alert_import_failed.description: Alert when an import file fails validation

template_pasted_email_title.description: Default title for a template auto-created from pasted email content

welcome_hero_title.description: Main heading on the post-install welcome page

welcome_hero_subtitle.message: Canned Responses is ready in Gmail & LinkedIn. Here's the one thing to remember:
welcome_hero_subtitle.description: Subheading explaining where the extension works

welcome_hotkey_instruction.message: Press it in any compose box → search a template → Enter to insert it right at your cursor.
welcome_hotkey_instruction.description: Explains how to use the hotkey to insert a template

welcome_card_insert_title.description: Feature card title for insertion methods

welcome_card_insert_desc.message: The Alt+A picker, or type ;shortcut + Tab to expand instantly.
welcome_card_insert_desc.description: Feature description for the two insertion methods

welcome_card_save_title.description: Feature card title for saving templates

welcome_card_save_desc.message: Select text in an email → click Save as template (or right-click → save).
welcome_card_save_desc.description: Feature description for saving a selection as a template

welcome_card_copy_title.description: Feature card title for copying emails

welcome_card_copy_desc.message: Open an email → Copy (next to Reply/Forward) → paste anywhere, styling kept.
welcome_card_copy_desc.description: Feature description for the email copy button

welcome_card_organize_title.description: Feature card title for organization features

welcome_card_organize_desc.message: Favorite, search, reorder, variables like {first_name}, export & import.

welcome_starter_templates_heading.description: Heading above the list of pre-seeded starter templates

welcome_theme_label.description: Label for the theme preference control on the welcome page

welcome_theme_hint.message: Applies to the picker, popup & manager.
welcome_theme_hint.description: Hint explaining where the theme preference applies

welcome_manage_templates_btn.description: Secondary button to open the template manager

welcome_footer_privacy.message: Local-first · no account · your templates never leave your device.
welcome_footer_privacy.description: Privacy assurance in the welcome page footer

welcome_empty_state.message: No templates yet — open the manager to add one.
welcome_empty_state.description: Empty state guiding the user to add a first template

picker_panel_title.description: Header label for the picker panel and the LinkedIn nav button label

picker_no_matches_query.description: Empty state in the picker when a search has no results, echoing the query

button_edit.description: Edit action label/tooltip in picker, manager, and capture toast

picker_new_template_btn.description: Button to create a new template from the picker footer

picker_new_template_title.description: Tooltip for the new-template button in the picker

picker_hint_insert.description: Keyboard hint for inserting the selected template

picker_hint_close.description: Keyboard hint for closing the picker

picker_back_btn_title.description: Tooltip for the back button on the variable-fill screen

button_back.description: Back navigation label/tooltip in picker and manager

picker_fill_heading.description: Heading prompting the user to fill in a template's variables

picker_insert_btn.description: Button to insert the filled-in template

picker_delete_confirm.description: Confirmation prompt when deleting a template from the picker

manager_edit_heading.description: Header when editing an existing template in the manager

manager_new_heading.description: Header when creating a new template in the manager

manager_title_placeholder.description: Placeholder for the template title input in the manager

manager_shortcut_placeholder.description: Placeholder for the shortcut input with an example

manager_insert_label.description: Label preceding the variable chip buttons

manager_body_placeholder.message: Write your template… use {first_name} for variables
manager_body_placeholder.description: Placeholder for the template body textarea

manager_discard_btn.description: Button to discard an unsaved new template draft

manager_full_editor_link.description: Link to open the full template editor in the options page

manager_save_btn.description: Save button in the inline manager editor

manager_delete_confirm.description: Confirmation prompt when deleting a template from the manager

toast_inserted.description: Toast shown after a template is inserted (via picker or ;shortcut expansion)

toast_copied.description: Toast shown after copying to clipboard

toast_saved_as_template.description: Toast after saving a selection as a new template

toast_images_pro_feature.description: Upsell note appended when images were stripped from a captured template

toast_template_limit_reached.message: Template limit reached ($lim$). Delete one to add more.
toast_template_limit_reached.description: Error toast when capturing would exceed the template limit

capture_pill_label.description: Label on the floating 'Save as template' pill shown over a selection

surface_btn_aria_label.description: Accessibility label for the injected Gmail/LinkedIn template button

gmail_btn_title.description: Tooltip for the Gmail top-bar template button

linkedin_btn_title.message: Canned Responses — manage templates (Alt+A to insert)
linkedin_btn_title.description: Tooltip for the LinkedIn nav template button

gmail_copy_btn_aria_label.description: Accessibility label for the Gmail Copy-email button

gmail_copy_btn_title.message: Copy this email with formatting & images
gmail_copy_btn_title.description: Tooltip for the Gmail Copy-email button

gmail_copy_btn_label.description: Label of the Gmail Copy-email button

toast_email_copied_success.message: Copied email — paste with Ctrl+V (font, colours & images kept)
toast_email_copied_success.description: Success toast after copying an email with formatting

toast_action_open_editor.description: Actionable link in the copy-success toast to open the full editor

toast_copy_failed.description: Error toast when the email copy operation fails

backup_nudge_message_one.message: You have $count$ template. Back it up so a reinstall can't lose it.
backup_nudge_message_one.description: Backup reminder banner; $count$ is the number of templates (singular)

backup_nudge_message_other.message: You have $count$ templates. Back them up so a reinstall can't lose them.
backup_nudge_message_other.description: Backup reminder banner; $count$ is the number of templates (plural)

confirm_delete_category_with_templates_o.message: Delete "$name$"? Its $n$ template will move to "All Templates" (not deleted).
confirm_delete_category_with_templates_o.description: Confirm deleting a category that still holds templates; $name$ = category, $n$ = number of templates (singular)

confirm_delete_category_with_templates_o.message: Delete "$name$"? Its $n$ templates will move to "All Templates" (not deleted).
confirm_delete_category_with_templates_o.description: Confirm deleting a category that still holds templates; $name$ = category, $n$ = number of templates (plural)

alert_import_success_one.description: Alert after a fully successful import; $count$ = number imported (singular)

alert_import_success_other.description: Alert after a fully successful import; $count$ = number imported (plural)
